title: TikTok Profile Scraper
description: Scrape public TikTok profiles and their videos with full analytics data.

usernames.title: TikTok Usernames or Profile URLs
usernames.description: List of TikTok usernames (e.g. charlidamelio) or full profile URLs. Only public profiles can be scraped.

maxVideosPerProfile.title: Max Videos per Profile (beta)
maxVideosPerProfile.description: Number of videos to scrape per profile. Profile data is always scraped reliably; video scraping is best-effort and slower. Leave at 0 for fast, reliable profile-only scraping.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Residential proxy rotation is strongly recommended for TikTok scraping.
